clarifier.summary: Change name: update-web-app. Scope: Kubernetes/kind deployment alignment for existing read-only web app hub. Deliverables: Deployment, Service/NodePort, RBAC/SA, env vars for in-cluster MCP/Hub access, kind port mapping/status output, readiness/smoke verification. Constraint: preserve read-only invariant. Author against current repo state (no build-web-app-hub archive prerequisite). Use MODIFIED/ADDED deltas under web-app-hub capability. Motivation: MCP service aligned to Scion steward flows; web UI must be deployable via standard kind/kustomize install aligned with MCP/steward changes.

explorer.summary: Explorer completed (containerStatus: Succeeded). Branch had no new commits; findings expected via message channel.
